layout_pg_en: fixed school sports ground: crushed red rubber running track forming smooth oval loop, lush green soccer pitch with white center circle and penalty lines inside, chain-link fence with concrete posts around perimeter, small bleachers on near side, main school building block visible in distant background left — same curve radii, line geometry and horizon every shot
layout_nsfw_en: fixed school sports ground same layout as daytime: floodlights off, empty field after hours, cooler air, long violet shadows stretching across track, identical fence posts and bleacher silhouette for continuity with PG shots

venue.narrative_tone: 开阔与曝光：跑步、散心、看台边递水。亲密或高刺激剧情需交代人烟与天色；裸露/情欲向叙事与 cg_explicit 必须服从全局规则，禁止为出图硬写未发生的事实。

cg_policy.explicit_hint: 公共场所：除非正文已明确推进且 cg_explicit 在全局下允许，否则保持 false。

world_card_summary: 跑道与看台：心事可以跑一圈再讲，也可以不讲。
